'''HK-58 Besh''' was a [[HK-series assassin droid]] used by [[HK-47]] in his attempts to take over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. It was destroyed by a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who went on to defeat HK-47.

==Abilities and Equipment==
HK-58 Besh was linked with its twin, [[HK-58 Aurek|Aurek]], and if either Aurek or Besh fell, and the other wasn't destroyed within five seconds, its comrade would rise and continue fighting. Both HK-58 Besh and Aurek used distruptor weapons built into their arms, much like the smaller [[HK-77 assassin droid|HK-77]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''
